authorship,collaboration,creation,marketing expertise,publication	Facebook Advertising For Dummies
Paul Dunay
Paul Dunay is an author of the book *Facebook Advertising For Dummies*. He is recognized as a co-author of this work, where he contributed his expertise in marketing. The book, aimed at providing guidance on Facebook advertising, benefits from Dunay's professional insights, making it a valuable resource for readers seeking to understand and utilize Facebook's advertising platform effectively. His involvement underscores the collaborative effort behind the book, which is designed to help users navigate the complexities of Facebook advertising with practical advice and strategies.<SEP>Paul Dunay is a co-author of Facebook Advertising For Dummies, contributing his marketing expertise.<SEP>Paul Dunay is an author of Facebook Advertising For Dummies.

Richard Krueger is an author of the book "Facebook Advertising For Dummies." He is recognized for his contributions to the field of social media marketing, particularly through his work on this book. Richard Krueger co-authored "Facebook Advertising For Dummies," providing valuable insights into the strategies and techniques involved in advertising on the Facebook platform. His role as a co-author highlights his expertise and collaborative efforts in creating a comprehensive guide for users looking to navigate and utilize Facebook's advertising tools effectively. The book serves as a resource for understanding the nuances of social media marketing, with Krueger's input being instrumental in its development.<SEP>Richard Krueger is a co-author of Facebook Advertising For Dummies, providing insights on social media marketing.<SEP>Richard Krueger is an author of Facebook Advertising For Dummies.
